creator: jf@dockes.org
text:
Edwin Groothuis writes:
 > Maintainer of deskutils/recoll,
 > 
 > Please note that PR ports/150131 has just been submitted.
 > 
 > If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
 > you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
 > and a committer will take care of it.
 > 
 > The full text of the PR can be found at:
 >     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/150131

The patch is from me (the maintainer), it was submitted from another
address because my usual server rejected it as spam for some reason. The
patch is approved, obviously.

Thanks,

J.F. Dockes
